name: EUCOM — Donbas rear
subtitle: Medium density, behind FLOT
description: Reduced posture for operations behind the line of contact in EUCOM AOR. Vehicular DF echeloned further away, no manpack DF on top of you, but Krasukha-class long-range jammers and strategic HF DF still cover the area. Use for staging areas, supply routes, rear command posts.

threats.note: Borisoglebsk-2 echeloned to N — beyond direct ground LoS
Murmansk-BN strategic HF DF — wide AOR coverage
